prompt: Edit image 1 (the car diagram). Redesign the car's body shape within the diagram to reflect the angular, futuristic style of image 2. Apply the vibrant purple color and green interior/trim details from image 3 to the modified car in the diagram, retaining the cutaway view and labels.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the red car diagram. Redesign the car's exterior body shape within image 1 to reflect the distinct angular and futuristic style of the vehicle in image 2. Apply the vibrant purple color from image 3 to the redesigned car's body, and integrate the prominent green interior and trim details visible in image 3. Ensure the original cutaway view of the car in image 1 is fully retained, along with all existing labels pointing to internal components.
objects: Purple, angular, futuristic car body (cutaway view)
Exposed internal car components (e.g., engine, frame, battery)
Text labels pointing to internal components
